text: Patient commenced on Olanzapine 10mg. Tolerating well.
Olanzapine dose increased to 15mg due to persistent symptoms.
Decision to switch from olanzapine to risperidone 4mg given weight gain.
Patient now established on Risperdal. Mental state stable.
Quetiapine increased to 400mg. Good response noted.
Continuing on Seroquel (quetiapine) 400mg. No side effects.
Continuing haloperidol. Extrapyramidal symptoms managed with procyclidine.
Initiated Clozaril (clozapine) following two failed trials.
Patient reviewed. No changes to management plan at this time.
